description: This file is a JavaScript module for managing DOM element instances in Bootstrap. It defines a Map to associate DOM elements with their instances and provides functions to set, get, and remove these instances, ensuring only one instance per element.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Associates a DOM element with a key and an instance, ensuring only one instance per element.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the instance associated with a DOM element and key.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the association of an instance from a DOM element and cleans up if no instances remain.
